plugin_desc: RELIANOID load balancer SNMP child template (enterprise 61269). The currently verified profile is a clean baseline built on standard MIB-II and IF-MIB ifXTable; no stable vendor-specific scalar device-health gauges are confirmed for CPU, memory, temperature, fan, power state or current connections. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json. The shared Loadbalance SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/loadbalance metric model while this plugin provides the RELIANOID collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. Supported brands/models — RELIANOID ADC and load-balancing appliances.
name: Loadbalance
